name: Pivot sales CSV into summary report
prompt: Read sales_data.csv (columns: date, product, region, amount, quantity) and produce pivot_report.json with the following fields: (1) total_revenue: the sum of amount * quantity across all rows, (2) top_product: the product name with the highest total revenue (amount * quantity), (3) top_region: the region with the highest total revenue, (4) monthly_breakdown: an array of objects with 'month' (format YYYY-MM) and 'revenue' fields sorted chronologically, (5) product_summary: an array of objects with 'product', 'total_revenue', and 'total_quantity' fields sorted by total_revenue descending.

criteria.description: pivot_report.json exists and is valid JSON

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
